# Spec specNN - Topic

> Governed by `docs/runbooks/spec-rules.md`. A spec is a stable contract, not a
> changelog. Daily progress belongs in `PLANS.md`.

- **Status:** Draft
- **Owner:** operator
- **Created:** YYYY-MM-DD

## Goal

Describe the user-visible outcome.

## Problem Statement

Describe the current gap and why it matters.

## Scope

1. Item one.
2. Item two.

## Non-Goals

- Out of scope item.

## Architecture Contract

Describe runtime boundaries and data flow.

## Config Contract

Describe tracked config and env-only runtime values.

## API Contract

Describe customer-facing endpoints and responses.

## Observability Contract

Describe runtime evidence and redaction.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Relevant tests pass.
- Relevant Docker Compose/config/docs checks pass.
- Live runtime behavior is proven when live behavior is in scope.
